title: T-006 — Hold create Server Action + multi-LP support (09-a-02)
prompt:
# T-006 — Hold create Server Action + multi-LP support

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §8.2 QA-012, §11.1 V-QA-HOLD-001..004, §6.3, §12.1 outbox quality.hold.created
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement a server action `createQualityHold(input)` that inserts quality_holds + N quality_hold_items, calls the 05-WH PUT /api/warehouse/lps/:id/qa-status='HOLD' for each LP target, emits quality.hold.created outbox event, and returns the hold_number.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/src/server/quality/createHold.ts` exports the Server Action with Zod schema enforcing V-QA-HOLD-001 (reference_type enum), V-QA-HOLD-002 (FK exists), V-QA-HOLD-004 (reason_code_id OR reason_free_text required).
2. RBAC guard: callers must hold one of (quality_lead, qa_inspector, hygiene_lead, shift_lead, prod_manager) per §2.3 matrix.
3. Transactional insert of quality_holds + quality_hold_items (skip when reference_type != 'lp' or single LP only). Outbox event row inserted in same TX.
4. After commit, call 05-WH PUT for each LP id (best-effort with retry; failure does NOT roll back hold creation but logs warning and emits quality.hold.lp_status_sync_failed).

## Files
- apps/web/src/server/quality/createHold.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/createHold.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a payload with reference_type='lp' and 3 license_plate_ids, when createQualityHold runs, then 1 quality_holds row is inserted, 3 quality_hold_items rows are inserted, 1 outbox quality.hold.created event is queued, all in one TX
2. Given a payload missing both reason_code_id and reason_free_text, when createQualityHold runs, then it rejects with V-QA-HOLD-004 error and writes nothing
3. Given the caller has only role 'auditor_readonly', when createQualityHold runs, then it rejects with 403 per §2.3 matrix
4. Given 05-WH PUT call fails after the TX commits, when createQualityHold runs, then the hold is still created and a quality.hold.lp_status_sync_failed event is emitted

pipeline_inputs.description: Server Action createQualityHold inserting quality_holds + quality_hold_items, emitting outbox event, syncing 05-WH LP status.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Action with Zod validation (reference_type enum, FK existence pre-check, reason required), RBAC guard against §2.3 matrix, transactional insert (hold + items + outbox row in one TX), then post-commit best-effort PUT to 05-WH /api/warehouse/lps/:id/qa-status with HOLD status. Failures of 05-WH PUT emit quality.hold.lp_status_sync_failed but do not roll back the hold. Tests cover happy path, validation rejection, RBAC rejection, and 05-WH sync failure path.
out_of_scope: Do not implement DSL state machine rule (T-008)
Do not build the create modal UI (T-015)
acceptance_criteria: Given a payload with reference_type='lp' and 3 license_plate_ids, when createQualityHold runs, then 1 quality_holds row + 3 quality_hold_items rows + 1 outbox quality.hold.created event are written in one TX
Given a payload missing both reason_code_id and reason_free_text, when createQualityHold runs, then it rejects with V-QA-HOLD-004 and writes nothing
Given the caller holds only role auditor_readonly, when createQualityHold runs, then it rejects with 403 per §2.3 matrix
Given 05-WH PUT fails after commit, when createQualityHold runs, then the hold is still persisted and a quality.hold.lp_status_sync_failed event is emitted
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/createHold.test.ts asserting all 4 ACs against fakes (db tx, 05-WH client mock) before implementation exists
risk_red_lines: Do not skip outbox event (downstream 05-WH/12-REP depend on it)
Do not roll back the hold on 05-WH sync failure (R14 retry pattern)
